name: Grasshopper Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups whipping cream, whipped and sweetened to taste (I use an 8 oz container Cool Whip instead)
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave marshmallows and creme de menthe in a large microwave-safe bowl on high for 1-2 minutes. Stir until smooth. Refrigerate for about 20 minutes, or until slightly thickened.
2. Fold in whipped cream. Spoon into prepared crust. Freeze until firm, about 3-4 hours.
3. Set out of the freezer about 15 minutes before serving to allow time to soften.
Notes: This tastes best if real whipping cream is used, but I usually opt for Cool Whip because of calories and cholesterol (hubbies' heart condition). This freezes well for several months. During the summer I usually have 3-4 such "freezer" pies on hand for emergencies, unexpected company, or days I just don't feel like cooking.
